requirement_topic.en: EMC Conformity — Türkmenstandart Certificate Based on GOST-TM Standards
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容合规——基于GOST-TM标准的Türkmenstandart合格证书
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容合規——基於GOST-TM標準的Türkmenstandart合格證書

summary.en: Wireless and radio-frequency devices sold in Turkmenistan must obtain a Certificate of Conformity from Türkmenstandart (the State Standard of Turkmenistan — Turkmenstandart), covering electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements. Turkmenistan applies GOST-TM standards that largely mirror the GOST-R system used in Russia, adapted for the Turkmen national context. EMC testing must demonstrate that the device does not cause harmful interference and is immune to external electromagnetic disturbances at levels consistent with the applicable GOST-TM standards. The Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity is distinct from and additional to the MINCOM type approval; both are required for wireless devices. Testing is typically conducted at laboratories accredited by or recognised under the Turkmen national accreditation system. Russian-language test reports and declarations are accepted.
summary.zh: 在土库曼斯坦销售的无线及射频设备须取得Türkmenstandart（土库曼斯坦国家标准委员会）颁发的合格证书，涵盖电磁兼容（EMC）要求。土库曼斯坦执行GOST-TM标准，该标准在很大程度上与俄罗斯的GOST-R体系相似，并针对土库曼国家背景进行了调整。EMC测试须证明设备不会产生有害干扰，并能按适用GOST-TM标准规定的水平抵御外部电磁干扰。Türkmenstandart合格证书与MINCOM型号核准相互独立且须叠加满足；无线设备两者均须具备。测试通常在土库曼国家认可体系认可或承认的实验室进行。俄语测试报告及声明可被接受。
summary.zht: 在土庫曼銷售的無線及射頻設備須取得Türkmenstandart（土庫曼國家標準委員會）頒發的合格證書，涵蓋電磁相容（EMC）要求。土庫曼執行GOST-TM標準，該標準在很大程度上與俄羅斯的GOST-R體系相似，並針對土庫曼國家背景進行了調整。EMC測試須證明設備不會產生有害干擾，並能按適用GOST-TM標準規定的水平抵禦外部電磁干擾。Türkmenstandart合格證書與MINCOM型號核准相互獨立且須疊加滿足；無線設備兩者均須具備。測試通常在土庫曼國家認可體系認可或承認的實驗室進行。俄語測試報告及聲明可被接受。

standards_or_laws: Türkmenstandart (State Standard of Turkmenistan) — national standards body issuing Certificates of Conformity for product conformity including EMC
GOST-TM EMC standards — Turkmenistan national standards mirroring GOST-R (e.g. GOST R 51318 series equivalents) for electromagnetic disturbance limits and immunity
Law of Turkmenistan 'On Standardisation' — establishes Türkmenstandart and mandatory conformity certification framework
Law of Turkmenistan 'On Conformity Assessment' — requires Certificate of Conformity for regulated product categories including radio equipment

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices must comply with electromagnetic compatibility requirements under China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) system, administered by CNCA. EMC requirements for wireless devices reference GB/T 9254 (information technology equipment EMC — conducted and radiated emissions) and GB/T 17626 series (immunity standards). The CCC mark attests conformity with Chinese national standards including EMC. SRRC approval also addresses radio-frequency interference parameters. Chinese CCC and GB-standard test reports are not recognised by Türkmenstandart and cannot substitute for a Turkmenistan Certificate of Conformity. Separate testing to GOST-TM standards at a Turkmen-accepted laboratory is required.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备须符合国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理的中国强制认证（CCC）体系下的电磁兼容要求。无线设备的电磁兼容要求参照GB/T 9254（信息技术设备EMC——传导和辐射骚扰）及GB/T 17626系列（抗扰度标准）。CCC标志证明符合包括EMC在内的中国国家标准。SRRC核准亦涉及射频干扰参数。中国CCC及GB标准测试报告不被Türkmenstandart承认，不可替代土库曼斯坦合格证书。须在土库曼认可实验室针对GOST-TM标准单独进行测试。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備須符合國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理的中國強制認證（CCC）體系下的電磁相容要求。無線設備的電磁相容要求參照GB/T 9254（信息技術設備EMC——傳導和輻射騷擾）及GB/T 17626系列（抗擾度標準）。CCC標誌證明符合包括EMC在內的中國國家標準。SRRC核准亦涉及射頻干擾參數。中國CCC及GB標準測試報告不被Türkmenstandart承認，不可替代土庫曼合格證書。須在土庫曼認可實驗室針對GOST-TM標準單獨進行測試。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for regulated product categories in China including wireless devices with EMC requirements
GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement
GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Testing and measurement techniques (immunity standards)

gap.en: Chinese CCC certification and GB-standard test reports carry no recognition in Turkmenistan. A Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity based on GOST-TM EMC standards must be obtained separately, supported by test reports from laboratories recognised under the Turkmen accreditation framework. This certificate is required in addition to (not instead of) MINCOM type approval. Exporters should note that the GOST-TM system, while substantially based on GOST-R, may differ in specific standard versions or local amendments; verification of which GOST-TM edition applies to the product category is recommended before testing.
gap.zh: 中国CCC认证和GB标准测试报告在土库曼斯坦不受承认。须单独取得基于GOST-TM电磁兼容标准的Türkmenstandart合格证书，并附上土库曼认可框架下认可实验室出具的测试报告。该证书须与MINCOM型号核准叠加满足，而非替代关系。出口商应注意，GOST-TM体系虽在很大程度上基于GOST-R，但在特定标准版本或地方修订方面可能存在差异；建议在测试前核实适用于该产品类别的GOST-TM版本。
gap.zht: 中國CCC認證和GB標準測試報告在土庫曼不受承認。須單獨取得基於GOST-TM電磁相容標準的Türkmenstandart合格證書，並附上土庫曼認可框架下認可實驗室出具的測試報告。該證書須與MINCOM型號核准疊加滿足，而非替代關係。出口商應注意，GOST-TM體系雖在很大程度上基於GOST-R，但在特定標準版本或地方修訂方面可能存在差異；建議在測試前核實適用於該產品類別的GOST-TM版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity (including EMC) required for wireless devices sold in Turkmenistan, in addition to MINCOM type approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification covering EMC required for regulated wireless devices sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity based on GOST-TM EMC standards is mandatory for wireless devices sold in Turkmenistan and is required in addition to MINCOM type approval. Chinese CCC and GB-standard test reports are not recognised. Testing at a Turkmen-accepted laboratory against GOST-TM standards is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 基于GOST-TM电磁兼容标准的Türkmenstandart合格证书对在土库曼斯坦销售的无线设备为强制要求，须与MINCOM型号核准叠加满足。中国CCC及GB标准测试报告不被承认。须在土库曼认可实验室按GOST-TM标准进行测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 基於GOST-TM電磁相容標準的Türkmenstandart合格證書對在土庫曼銷售的無線設備為強制要求，須與MINCOM型號核准疊加滿足。中國CCC及GB標準測試報告不被承認。須在土庫曼認可實驗室按GOST-TM標準進行測試。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Spectrum and Interference — GOST-TM Radio Equipment Standards Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频谱与干扰——GOST-TM无线电设备标准合规
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻譜與干擾——GOST-TM無線電設備標準合規

summary.en: In addition to MINCOM type approval for spectrum licensing purposes, wireless devices sold in Turkmenistan must demonstrate conformity with GOST-TM radio equipment technical standards covering spurious emissions, occupied bandwidth, power limits, and other radio parameters. These technical requirements are assessed during both the MINCOM type approval process and the Türkmenstandart conformity certification. The applicable standards mirror the GOST-R radio equipment standards series (e.g. equivalents to GOST R 54428, GOST R 55075 for short-range devices, and relevant IEC/ETSI-derived GOST standards for WLAN and Bluetooth). Technical documentation including block diagrams, circuit descriptions, and test results must be provided in Russian. Turkmenistan applies ITU Radio Regulations as the basis for spectrum coordination, as it is an ITU member state.
summary.zh: 除用于频谱许可目的的MINCOM型号核准外，在土库曼斯坦销售的无线设备还须证明符合GOST-TM无线电设备技术标准，涵盖杂散发射、占用带宽、功率限制及其他无线电参数。这些技术要求在MINCOM型号核准流程和Türkmenstandart合规认证期间均须评估。适用标准与GOST-R无线电设备标准系列相对应（例如，与GOST R 54428、GOST R 55075（短距设备）及相关基于IEC/ETSI的WLAN和蓝牙GOST标准对应的等效标准）。技术文件（含框图、电路说明及测试结果）须以俄语提供。土库曼斯坦作为国际电信联盟成员国，以ITU无线电规则作为频谱协调的基础。
summary.zht: 除用於頻譜許可目的的MINCOM型號核准外，在土庫曼銷售的無線設備還須證明符合GOST-TM無線電設備技術標準，涵蓋雜散發射、占用帶寬、功率限制及其他無線電參數。這些技術要求在MINCOM型號核准流程和Türkmenstandart合規認證期間均須評估。適用標準與GOST-R無線電設備標準系列相對應（例如，與GOST R 54428、GOST R 55075（短距設備）及相關基於IEC/ETSI的WLAN和藍牙GOST標準對應的等效標準）。技術文件（含框圖、電路說明及測試結果）須以俄語提供。土庫曼作為國際電信聯盟成員國，以ITU無線電規則作為頻譜協調的基礎。

standards_or_laws: GOST-TM radio equipment standards — Turkmenistan national standards series mirroring GOST-R for radio parameter conformity (spurious emissions, bandwidth, power limits)
ITU Radio Regulations — Turkmenistan applies ITU frequency allocation framework as an ITU member state
MINCOM frequency allocation regulations — Turkmenistan national frequency table for civilian radio equipment
GOST R 54428 equivalent (TM) — Short-range devices, general requirements
GOST R 55075 equivalent (TM) — Short-range devices, specific categories

summary.en: Chinese radio devices must comply with SRRC technical requirements covering radio parameters including frequency, power, spurious emissions, and bandwidth under Chinese national standards and MIIT regulations. GB standards such as GB 15629.11 (WLAN) and YD/T series (cellular) specify the applicable radio parameter limits for devices sold in China. SRRC type approval evaluation includes testing of these radio parameters at SRRC-designated laboratories. Chinese SRRC approval documents and GB-standard radio parameter test reports are not accepted by MINCOM or Türkmenstandart as substitutes for GOST-TM conformity. Re-testing against GOST-TM radio equipment standards at a Turkmen-accepted laboratory is required.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备须符合SRRC技术要求，涵盖依据中国国家标准及工业和信息化部法规的频率、功率、杂散发射及带宽等无线电参数。GB 15629.11（WLAN）和YD/T系列（蜂窝）等GB标准规定了在中国销售设备的适用无线电参数限值。SRRC型号核准评估包括在SRRC指定实验室对上述无线电参数的测试。中国SRRC核准文件及GB标准无线电参数测试报告不被MINCOM或Türkmenstandart接受作为GOST-TM合规的替代依据。须在土库曼认可实验室重新针对GOST-TM无线电设备标准进行测试。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備須符合SRRC技術要求，涵蓋依據中國國家標準及工業和信息化部法規的頻率、功率、雜散發射及帶寬等無線電參數。GB 15629.11（WLAN）和YD/T系列（蜂窩）等GB標準規定了在中國銷售設備的適用無線電參數限值。SRRC型號核准評估包括在SRRC指定實驗室對上述無線電參數的測試。中國SRRC核准文件及GB標準無線電參數測試報告不被MINCOM或Türkmenstandart接受作為GOST-TM合規的替代依據。須在土庫曼認可實驗室重新針對GOST-TM無線電設備標準進行測試。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — technical evaluation of radio parameters under MIIT regulations
YD/T series — MIIT standards for cellular device radio parameters
GB/T 22450 series — Radio equipment for short-range devices

gap.en: Chinese SRRC radio parameter test reports to GB standards are not recognised by MINCOM or Türkmenstandart. Complete re-testing against applicable GOST-TM radio equipment standards at a Turkmen-accepted laboratory is required. Technical documentation must be submitted in Russian. Exporters should confirm the specific GOST-TM versions in force at time of submission, as Turkmenistan may adopt GOST-R amendments on a delayed schedule. ITU-compliant frequency use is a baseline; MINCOM's national frequency table determines what is permitted in Turkmenistan specifically, and some frequencies permitted in China may not be authorised in Turkmenistan.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC无线电参数测试报告按GB标准出具，不被MINCOM或Türkmenstandart承认。须在土库曼认可实验室针对适用GOST-TM无线电设备标准重新进行全面测试。技术文件须以俄语提交。出口商应在提交时确认当时有效的具体GOST-TM版本，因为土库曼斯坦可能以延迟时间表采纳GOST-R修订。符合ITU的频率使用是基准；MINCOM国家频率表决定了土库曼斯坦境内具体允许使用的频率，在中国允许使用的某些频率在土库曼斯坦可能未获授权。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC無線電參數測試報告按GB標準出具，不被MINCOM或Türkmenstandart承認。須在土庫曼認可實驗室針對適用GOST-TM無線電設備標準重新進行全面測試。技術文件須以俄語提交。出口商應在提交時確認當時有效的具體GOST-TM版本，因為土庫曼可能以延遲時間表採納GOST-R修訂。符合ITU的頻率使用是基準；MINCOM國家頻率表決定了土庫曼境內具體允許使用的頻率，在中國允許使用的某些頻率在土庫曼可能未獲授權。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — GOST-TM radio equipment standards conformity required as part of both MINCOM type approval and Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity; Russian-language technical documentation required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio parameter evaluation under GB standards required for radio devices sold in China

source.publisher: Türkmenstandart — State Standard of Turkmenistan; MINCOM — Ministry of Communications of Turkmenistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GOST-TM radio equipment standards conformity — covering spurious emissions, bandwidth, and power limits — is required for all wireless devices sold in Turkmenistan as part of both MINCOM type approval and Türkmenstandart certification. Chinese SRRC radio parameter reports are not substitutes. Re-testing at a Turkmen-accepted laboratory with Russian-language documentation is required. Exporters must also verify that device operating frequencies are permitted under the MINCOM national frequency table.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 所有在土库曼斯坦销售的无线设备，均须在MINCOM型号核准和Türkmenstandart认证框架内满足GOST-TM无线电设备标准合规要求，涵盖杂散发射、带宽及功率限制。中国SRRC无线电参数报告不可替代。须在土库曼认可实验室以俄语文件重新进行测试。出口商还须核实设备工作频率是否在MINCOM国家频率表允许范围内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 所有在土庫曼銷售的無線設備，均須在MINCOM型號核准和Türkmenstandart認證框架內滿足GOST-TM無線電設備標準合規要求，涵蓋雜散發射、帶寬及功率限制。中國SRRC無線電參數報告不可替代。須在土庫曼認可實驗室以俄語文件重新進行測試。出口商還須核實設備工作頻率是否在MINCOM國家頻率表允許範圍內。
